title: Removal of warning device
doc_html:
§373.  Removal of warning device

No person shall willfully remove any warning device placed upon the highways under the provisions of R.S. 32:367 through R.S. 32:369 before the driver is ready to proceed upon the highway.

Acts 1962, No. 310, §1.

§373.  Removal of warning device
No person shall willfully remove any warning device placed upon the highways under the provisions of R.S. 32:367 through R.S. 32:369 before the driver is ready to proceed upon the highway.
Acts 1962, No. 310, §1.
